demographics.living_situation: unknown — driver of a vehicle that crashed outside a private rural residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: He hit the tree going at least 100km/h, he isn't waking up, and there's blood everywhere!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A car has just smashed into a tree out the front of the house about five minutes ago — the driver is stuck in the seat, won't wake up and is bleeding badly. The bystander is calling for help and needs to know what to do right now.

symptom_narrative.onset: about five minutes ago — the car hit a tree at high speed
symptom_narrative.duration: ongoing since the impact five minutes ago
symptom_narrative.character: he's slumped in the driver's seat, not properly awake, breathing has gone funny and there's a lot of blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bystander says it looks really bad — he's stuck, covered in blood and not responding
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: blood pouring from a big cut on his head, and his left leg looks bent the wrong way
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: he hasn't woken up properly at all since the crash
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — the bystander doesn't know what to do
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: he seems to be getting worse — his breathing changed from snoring to short shallow gasps
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he looks really pale, he's trapped by the crushed dashboard, and the steering wheel is bent
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: unknown — the bystander doesn't know him
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely unresponsive and trapped in the driver's seat

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: unknown to the bystander — a stranger whose car crashed outside their home in a rural area

objective_data_offered.value: he won't wake up or answer, he's just slumped over and floppy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay bystander impression, not a formal neurological assessment

objective_data_offered.value: he was making snoring noises at first, now he's taking short shallow gasps
there's a big cut on his head and blood everywhere
his left thigh looks bent and deformed
he's trapped in the seat, the steering wheel is bent and the dash is crushed into his legs; the airbags went off
there's fluid leaking out from under the car
